entry.data:
MOSTLY CLEAR
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE MID 60S
SOUTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
MORE HUMID WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
NORTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
NORTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH, DIMINISHING TO AROUND 5 MPH AFTER MIDNIGHT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S

PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY AND BREEZY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S

PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN SHOWERS LIKELY AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT
